arabic_text:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
[long Arabic du'a invoking blessings on the Prophet, his family, and the Imams; mentions the bestowal of intercession]
alt_text: Arabic du'a / salat formula beginning with the basmala, invoking blessings (salawat) upon the Prophet, his family, and the Imams; asks God to send peace upon the rightly-guided.
notes: Devotional du'a — salawat formula. Resolution and ligature density make full transcription difficult; classification confident but exact wording flagged for human review.
